ddl.where: "created_by" IS NOT NULL AND "deleted_at" IS NULL
ddl.name: idx_exercises_created_by

ddl.value: ("origin" = 'platform' AND "created_by" IS NULL AND "user_prompt" IS NULL) OR ("origin" = 'user' AND "created_by" IS NOT NULL AND "user_prompt" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: exercises_origin_consistency_check

ddl.value: ("owner_type" = 'user' AND "user_id" IS NOT NULL AND "org_id" IS NULL) OR ("owner_type" = 'org' AND "org_id" IS NOT NULL AND "user_id" IS NULL)
ddl.name: subscriptions_owner_check

ddl.value: ("owner_type" = 'user' AND "total_seats" IS NULL) OR ("owner_type" = 'org' AND "total_seats" IS NOT NULL AND "total_seats" > 0)
ddl.name: subscriptions_seats_check
